shared_inclusions: Drinks (water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava)

tier_b.label: Mangusta 80 superyacht — Marbella flagship
tier_b.extended_note: Longer charters (full day, overnight, multi-day) quoted on WhatsApp.

boats.name: Astondoa 40
boats.tagline: Spanish-built 12.5 m motor yacht — "Fufi" — at home in Puerto Banús
highlights: Flybridge with shaded bimini and second helm
Cream-leather saloon with table-for-six and AC
Two private cabins for overnight charter
Snorkel gear, inflatable donut & paddleboard on board
boats.hero_local_alt: Astondoa 40 motor yacht "Fufi" cruising off Marbella with La Concha mountain behind

gallery_local.alt: Astondoa 40 arriving at Puerto Banús marina at sunset
Astondoa 40 interior saloon with cream leather seating and teak finish
Guests relaxing on the bow of the Astondoa 40 at Puerto Banús marina

boats.summary: Astondoa 40 — known as "Fufi" — is the Spanish equivalent of the classic Mediterranean motor yacht. Built in Cádiz by Astondoa, fitted out in teak and cream leather, and at home anchoring off the Golden Mile for a long lunch. 12.5 metres, 9 guests, skipper and fuel included.

boats.name: Azimut 39
boats.tagline: Italian-built 12.5 m flybridge motor yacht — up to 11 guests
highlights: Flybridge with second helm and sunbathing pad
Sleek Italian styling — Azimut's signature reverse sheer line
Two cabins plus convertible saloon for overnight
boats.hero_local_alt: Azimut 39 motor yacht cruising in Marbella with La Concha mountain behind

gallery_local.alt: Azimut 39 from above — flybridge, cockpit and swim platform

boats.summary: The Azimut 39 is the Italian counterpart to the Astondoa — same size class, same 9-guest capacity, but with the flybridge layout and modern lines Azimut is known for. A great pick for groups who want the upper sun-deck experience.

boats.name: Mangusta 80
boats.tagline: "Nina" — the biggest yacht you can rent in Marbella · 24 m Italian flagship with on-board jet ski · in service since 2020
highlights: Biggest yacht available for day charter in Marbella — 24 m / 80 ft
Sea-Doo jet ski on board — free for guests to use throughout the charter
Open-style sport yacht with full-beam sun-pad and aft swim platform
12 guests in luxury — chef-grade galley and air-conditioned saloon
Crewed by captain + deckhand; drinks, fuel, insurance and VAT included
In our charter fleet since 2020 — fully refit, immaculate condition
Minimum charter 4 hours; full-day and overnight options quoted on WhatsApp
boats.hero_local_alt: Mangusta 80 'Nina' cruising past La Concha mountain in Marbella — the biggest charter yacht on the Costa del Sol

gallery_local.alt: Mangusta 80 from above — wake spreading behind the 24 m sport-yacht hull
Mangusta 80 profile view at anchor — the unmistakable Overmarine sport-yacht silhouette
Full-beam sun pad on the Mangusta 80 foredeck — guests relaxing during a Marbella charter
Mangusta 80 main-deck saloon with leather seating and refit interior
Chef-grade galley on the Mangusta 80 — full kitchen for catered lunches on board

boats.summary: The Mangusta 80 — known on the dock as "Nina" — is the Marbella flagship: a 24-metre Italian sport yacht by Overmarine, in our charter fleet since 2020, and the largest boat available for day charter from Puerto Banús. Twelve guests in genuine luxury, a Sea-Doo jet ski waiting on the swim platform, and the unmistakable Mangusta open-style superstructure that put the brand on the global map. From €4,719 for a 4-hour charter, fully crewed.
